'''''Mauler''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that was part of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat's]] planetary defenses. It was present at the [[Battle of Kuat (Hunt for Zsinj)|Battle of Kuat]]. After its [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] squadrons had been overwhelmed to only a few remaining fighters by the [[Hawk-bat/Legends|Hawk-bats]] and [[Vibroaxe Prime]], ''Mauler'', to escape being defenseless to the snub fighters, bypassed the engagement zone by a significant distance, only to find itself within the range of [[Zsinj]]'s [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]], [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']]. After a futile attempt of contending with the opposing ship, ''Mauler'' found herself spinning inflamed from half a dozen spots along her hull. Presumptuously the captain had believed that he could bring the damage under control.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}}
